news.title: Xiaomi Launches Watch S4 41mm and Smart Band 10
news.summary: Xiaomi introduces the Watch S4 41mm, a compact version of its flagship Watch S4, and the Smart Band 10 with enhanced features. The Watch S4 41mm boasts a 1.32-inch AMOLED display, 60Hz refresh rate, and 8-day battery life, while the Smart Band 10 comes with a 1.72-inch AMOLED display and up to 21 days of battery life.
news.content: Xiaomi has expanded its wearables lineup with the introduction of the Watch S4 41mm and Smart Band 10. The Watch S4 41mm features a 1.32-inch round AMOLED display with a resolution of 466 x 466px, a 60Hz refresh rate, and peak brightness of 2,200 nits. It is 5ATM waterproof and weighs 32 grams. The watch includes Xiaomi's updated 4-LED + 4PD heart rate module for accurate health tracking and a modified version of Xiaomi’s Xring T1 chip with a modem that’s 35% more efficient than the one in the regular Xiaomi S4 watch. It also offers real-time swim heart rate tracking and an 8-day battery life. The Smart Band 10 upgrades to a 1.72-inch AMOLED display with a 60Hz refresh rate and up to 1,500 nits peak local brightness. It offers more accurate health and activity tracking thanks to its 9-axis sensor and sleep monitoring with a guided improvement plan. The Band 10 also gets an updated vibration motor and the same 233mAh battery as its predecessor which is rated at up to 21 days in typical usage and 9 days with Always-On display mode activated.

news.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 Receives Update with New Gestures and Enhanced Smart Replies
news.summary: Google's Pixel Watch 4 has received a software update that introduces new gestures, such as double pinch and wrist turn, allowing users to control the watch without touching the screen. Additionally, the smart replies feature has been improved with a new on-device language model for faster and more efficient responses.
news.content: Google's Pixel Watch 4 has been updated to include new gesture controls and enhanced smart replies. The new update allows users to perform actions like scrolling through notifications, dismissing them, snoozing alarms, managing a timer or stopwatch, pausing music, selecting a smart reply, answering and ending phone calls with a double pinch or wrist turn. The smart replies feature has also been improved, now using an on-device Gemma-based language model that is twice as fast and almost three times more efficient in memory usage compared to the previous model.

news.title: NASA Partners with ODG to Explore Smart Glasses for Astronauts
news.summary: NASA and Osterhout Design Group (ODG) have announced a partnership to explore the use of smart glasses by astronauts for both terrestrial and space-based activities, aiming to increase mission efficiency with advanced, hands-free augmented reality technology.
news.content: NASA and Osterhout Design Group (ODG) have joined forces to investigate the potential use of smart glasses by astronauts during both training on Earth and space missions. The organizations plan to utilize ODG's technology, which projects 3G graphics onto a tablet, offering a high-tech, hands-free experience ideal for space travel. The smart glasses, equipped with position sensors, gain full awareness of the user's location, gaze direction, and movement, which can significantly enhance the accuracy and efficiency of astronauts' in-flight activities.

news.title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max Showcases Advanced AI Integration
news.summary: Apple's iPhone 16 Pro Max, released in September 2024, features the A18 Pro chip with a dedicated neural engine for Apple Intelligence, offering on-device AI processing for enhanced privacy, impressive photography capabilities, and a revamped personal assistant with more natural conversations and proactive task management.
news.content: The Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max, launched in September 2024, demonstrates Apple's most advanced AI integration to date. It is equipped with the A18 Pro chip, which includes a dedicated neural engine specifically optimized for Apple Intelligence. This integration allows for on-device AI processing that enhances privacy and delivers impressive photography capabilities. The device also includes a personal assistant that has been updated to provide more natural conversations and proactive task management, setting a new standard for AI in smartphones.

news.title: Huami Unveils Smart Watch 2 and Health Watch with ECG Sensors
news.summary: Huami, a Xiaomi-owned company, has unveiled two new smartwatches featuring electrocardiogram sensors (ECG), enhancing their health tracking capabilities. The Amazfit Smart Watch 2 offers a 1.39” OLED display and 4G support, while the Health Watch focuses on ECG and optical heart rate sensor for arrhythmia detection.
news.content: Huami has introduced two new smartwatches, the Amazfit Smart Watch 2 and the Health Watch, both equipped with electrocardiogram sensors (ECG) for advanced health monitoring. The Amazfit Smart Watch 2 comes with a 1.39” OLED display, offering a resolution of 454 x 454px, and is powered by the Snapdragon Wear 2500 chipset. It supports 4G with an eSIM and VoLTE, and its 420mAh battery promises 28 hours in 4G mode. The Health Watch, on the other hand, emphasizes health tracking with its ECG sensor and optical heart rate sensor, capable of detecting arrhythmia and atrial fibrillation.

news.title: Google Acquires Smart Glasses Maker North
news.summary: Google has acquired North, a Canadian smart glasses manufacturer known for its Focals line, signaling Google's continued investment in ambient computing and smartglass technology. North's expertise in neuromuscular input devices and smartglass technology is expected to bolster Google's hardware efforts.
news.content: Google has confirmed the acquisition of North, a Canadian company that developed the Focals smart glasses. The move indicates Google's ongoing commitment to its hardware division and the future of ambient computing. North, previously known as Thalmic Labs, was known for its smart glasses that used a retinal projection to display images and a smart ring for control. The company was also working on developing prescription smart glasses. With this acquisition, Google gains North's technical expertise, which will aid in the development of its hardware and smartglass technology.

news.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra Positioned as 'True AI Companion'
news.summary: Samsung's Galaxy S25 Ultra, released in February 2025, is designed to be a 'true AI companion' with the Snapdragon 8 Elite processor dedicated to optimizing AI for various tasks, including photography capabilities with AI scene recognition and real-time image processing.
news.content: Samsung's Galaxy S25 Ultra has been introduced as a 'true AI companion', highlighting the device's advanced AI capabilities. Released in February 2025, the smartphone is equipped with the Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, which is specifically designed to optimize AI for a range of tasks. Key features of the device include its photography capabilities, with AI scene recognition and real-time image processing, making it a standout in the market. Samsung has also enhanced its Galaxy AI suite, offering tools like predictive text, automated task completion, and natural language interactions throughout the interface.

news.title: Huawei Announces New AI-Powered PC with Advanced Chipset
news.summary: Huawei has announced a new AI-powered PC featuring an advanced chipset technology, enhancing the device's processing capabilities and energy efficiency, setting a new standard in AI PC technology.
news.content: Huawei has revealed its latest AI-powered PC, highlighting the device's advanced chipset technology that significantly improves processing capabilities and energy efficiency. This new PC is designed to deliver high-performance AI computing for both professional and consumer use, setting a new benchmark in the AI PC market. The device's advanced chipset allows for faster AI processing and learning, making it an ideal choice for tasks that require significant computational power.

news.title: Rokid Launches New Smart Glasses with Enhanced AR Features
news.summary: Rokid, a leading AR technology company, has launched its newest smart glasses with enhanced augmented reality features, providing users with an immersive experience and advanced interaction capabilities.
news.content: Rokid, known for its cutting-edge AR technology, has unveiled its latest smart glasses that come with enhanced augmented reality features. These new smart glasses offer an immersive experience and advanced interaction capabilities, allowing users to engage with digital content in a more intuitive and natural way. The launch of these smart glasses further solidifies Rokid's position as an industry leader in AR technology and wearable devices.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Reaches Major Milestone with New Release
news.summary: The Zephyr project, a leading real-time operating system, has reached a major milestone with the release of its new version, offering improved security features and better support for diverse hardware platforms.
news.content: The Zephyr project has announced a significant milestone with the release of its latest version of the Zephyr Real-Time Operating System (RTOS). This new release brings improved security features and enhanced support for a wider range of hardware platforms, making it an ideal choice for developers working on IoT and embedded systems. The updated Zephyr RTOS offers a more robust and flexible solution for real-time processing needs, catering to the growing demands of the IoT industry.

news.title: Tuya Smart Partners with Major Brands to Expand AI Ecosystem
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a global AIoT platform, has announced partnerships with several major brands to expand its AI ecosystem, offering more integrated smart home solutions and enhancing its global presence.
news.content: Tuya Smart, a leading global AIoT platform, has revealed new partnerships with several major brands in an effort to expand its AI ecosystem. These collaborations will lead to more integrated smart home solutions and strengthen Tuya Smart's global footprint. By partnering with these brands, Tuya Smart aims to provide consumers with a seamless and intelligent smart home experience, further solidifying its position as a key player in the AIoT industry.

news.title: Intel Introduces New AI-Enabled Drone with Advanced Navigation
news.summary: Intel has introduced a new AI-enabled drone that utilizes advanced navigation and obstacle avoidance technologies, showcasing the potential of AI in transforming the drone industry.
news.content: Intel has unveiled its latest AI-enabled drone, which incorporates advanced navigation and obstacle avoidance technologies. This new drone demonstrates the significant potential of AI in revolutionizing the drone industry by offering enhanced safety and efficiency. The drone's AI capabilities allow it to navigate complex environments with ease, making it suitable for a wide range of applications, from surveillance to delivery services.
